title: Cyclophorus adnascens
taxonomy: Cyclophorus adnascens is classified as a species of air-breathing land snail, a type of gastropod mollusk in the family Cyclophoridae. It belongs to the kingdom Animalia, phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and order Pulmonata. The family Cyclophoridae is a group of small to medium-sized land snails found primarily in Southeast Asia and the Indian subcontinent. This classification is based on morphological and molecular studies of the species. Further research is needed to confirm the classification of Cyclophorus adnascens.
uses: Cyclophorus adnascens has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
